name: Stomachmates with Suzu
description:
So, bad news, you've been vored. But at least you're not alone in there- seems like this rat girl has been stuck here for a while. She looks pretty despondent, but you know what they say: misery loves company, right?

Simple lil' bot inspired by its image. Not much going on here, just a sad rat.

Art source
creator: fishtankman42
